ddls:
CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the system (e.g., server, desktop, mobile) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system */,
  "system_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the system */,
  "system_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "system_hardware" TEXT /* Hardware specifications of the system */,
  "system_location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the system */,
  "system_status" TEXT /* Current status of the system (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., CPU Load, Memory Usage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the performance metric (e.g., %, KB) */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the performance metric (e.g., CPU, Memory, Network) */,
  "metric_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric to trigger alerts */,
  "metric_criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the metric (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_measurements" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time measurement */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being measured */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being measured */,
  "time_value" INTEGER /* Time value (in milliseconds) */,
  "measurement_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "measurement_interval" INTEGER /* Interval between measurements (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_measurements_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_measurements_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpu_loads" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPU load measurement */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being measured */,
  "load_value" INTEGER /* CPU load value (in %) */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time measurement */,
  "load_threshold_exceeded" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the load exceeds the threshold */,
  "load_criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the load (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpu_loads_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_measurements ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpu_loads_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_usages" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory usage measurement */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being measured */,
  "usage_value" INTEGER /* Memory usage value (in KB) */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time measurement */,
  "usage_threshold_exceeded" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the usage exceeds the threshold */,
  "usage_criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the usage (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_usages_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_usages_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_measurements ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_powers" (
  "power_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery power measurement */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being measured */,
  "power_value" REAL /* Battery power value (in uW) */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time measurement */,
  "power_threshold_exceeded" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the power exceeds the threshold */,
  "power_criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the power (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_powers_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_measurements ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_powers_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_power_deltas" (
  "delta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery power delta measurement */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being measured */,
  "delta_value" REAL /* Battery power delta value (in uW) */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time measurement */,
  "delta_threshold_exceeded" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the delta exceeds the threshold */,
  "delta_criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the delta (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_power_deltas_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_power_deltas_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_measurements ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp */,
  "dashboard_shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs who have access to the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "widget_size" TEXT /* Size of the widget (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "widget_position" TEXT /* Position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  "widget_data_source" TEXT /* Data source for the widget (e.g., CPU load, memory usage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_generated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs who have access to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance data */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_metrics" (
  "system_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system-metric pair */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being measured */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being measured */,
  "metric_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of metric collection (in seconds) */,
  "metric_last_collected" TEXT /* Last timestamp when the metric was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_metrics_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
